chapter_title: Illness or injury during long service leave
snippet: An employee who becomes ill or is injured during long service leave may be granted personal leave (refer to Personal Leave — Teaching Service for more information including eligibility requirements). Where this occurs, the equivalent amount of long service credits will be restored to the employee. The initial period of leave will not be automatically extended, however an employee may apply for an extension of the leave. Overview Long Service Leave – Teaching Service - Overview Resources Resources for Long Service Leave — Teaching Service Policy and Guidelines for Long Service Leave — Teaching Service Reviewed 14 September 2023
